description:
This quiz assesses JavaScript proficiency across ES2015 to ES2022, testing knowledge of modern language features through multiple‑choice questions. It is positioned as a casual, self‑paced challenge with a light‑hearted, encouraging tone, suitable for developers seeking to gauge their skill level.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) syntax and features, ES2020–ES2022 updates, Modern JavaScript concepts, Module imports and component usage
Audience: Front‑end developers and JavaScript enthusiasts of intermediate to advanced skill looking for a quick competency check.
